research.title: The Multi-CLI Stack — Orchestrating Claude Code + Codex + Gemini CLI in One Workflow
research.whyTrending: HN-front-page tools: Mysti (debate-then-synthesize), DevSquad (delegate to Gemini/Codex when Claude context heavy), Roundtable MCP (zero-config orchestration), CloudCLI (8.2k stars). Pragmatic Engineer survey: top teams compose 3 agents, not pick one. Gap: every comparison post is 'X vs Y vs Z' — nobody writes the 'how to use all three together' playbook.
